aiDisplayCode:
function candidate(value) {
  if (typeof value !== 'string') return false

  const trimmed = value.trim()
  if (trimmed === '') return false

  const typePart = trimmed.split(';', 1)[0].trim().toLowerCase()
  if (!/^[!#$%&'*+.^_`|~0-9a-z-]+\/[!#$%&'*+.^_`|~0-9a-z-]+$/.test(typePart)) return false

  const charsets = {
    'application/ecmascript': 'UTF-8',
    'application/javascript': 'UTF-8',
    'application/json': 'UTF-8',
    'application/ld+json': 'UTF-8',
    'application/manifest+json': 'UTF-8',
    'application/rss+xml': 'UTF-8',
    'application/atom+xml': 'UTF-8',
    'application/wasm': 'UTF-8',
    'application/x-javascript': 'UTF-8',
    'application/xhtml+xml': 'UTF-8',
    'application/xml': 'UTF-8',
    'image/svg+xml': 'UTF-8'
  }

  if (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(charsets, typePart)) {
    return charsets[typePart]
  }

  const knownText = new Set([
    'text/cache-manifest',
    'text/calendar',
    'text/css',
    'text/csv',
    'text/html',
    'text/javascript',
    'text/markdown',
    'text/plain',
    'text/tab-separated-values',
    'text/xml'
  ])

  if (knownText.has(typePart)) return 'UTF-8'

  return false
}
specSummary: Determines the character encoding for a valid media type string, returning an explicit charset, a text default, or false.

aiDisplayCode:
function candidate(value) {
  if (typeof value !== 'string' || value.length === 0) return false

  const known = {
    html: 'text/html',
    htm: 'text/html',
    txt: 'text/plain',
    text: 'text/plain',
    css: 'text/css',
    csv: 'text/csv',
    js: 'application/javascript',
    mjs: 'application/javascript',
    json: 'application/json',
    map: 'application/json',
    xml: 'application/xml',
    svg: 'image/svg+xml',
    png: 'image/png',
    jpg: 'image/jpeg',
    jpeg: 'image/jpeg',
    gif: 'image/gif',
    webp: 'image/webp',
    pdf: 'application/pdf',
    wasm: 'application/wasm'
  }

  const isType = /^[^\s/;]+\/[^\s;]+(?:\s*;\s*[^=;\s]+=[^;]+)*$/.test(value)
  let result = isType ? value : known[value.replace(/^\.+/, '').toLowerCase()]

  if (!result) return false

  if (!/(?:^|;)\s*charset\s*=/.test(result)) {
    const base = result.split(';', 1)[0].trim().toLowerCase()
    let fallback = null

    if (base.startsWith('text/')) fallback = 'utf-8'
    else if (base === 'application/json' || base.endsWith('+json')) fallback = 'utf-8'
    else if (
      base === 'application/javascript' ||
      base === 'application/xml' ||
      base.endsWith('+xml')
    )
      fallback = 'utf-8'

    if (fallback) result += '; charset=' + fallback
  }

  return result
}

aiDisplayCode:
function candidate(value) {
  if (typeof value !== 'string' || value.length === 0) {
    return false
  }

  var types = {
    html: 'text/html',
    htm: 'text/html',
    shtml: 'text/html',
    js: 'application/javascript',
    mjs: 'application/javascript',
    json: 'application/json',
    map: 'application/json',
    rtf: 'application/rtf',
    txt: 'text/plain',
    text: 'text/plain',
    conf: 'text/plain',
    def: 'text/plain',
    list: 'text/plain',
    log: 'text/plain',
    in: 'text/plain',
    ini: 'text/plain',
    xml: 'application/xml',
    xsl: 'application/xml',
    xsd: 'application/xml',
    css: 'text/css',
    csv: 'text/csv',
    md: 'text/markdown',
    markdown: 'text/markdown',
    pdf: 'application/pdf',
    zip: 'application/zip',
    gz: 'application/gzip',
    gif: 'image/gif',
    jpg: 'image/jpeg',
    jpeg: 'image/jpeg',
    png: 'image/png',
    svg: 'image/svg+xml',
    webp: 'image/webp',
    ico: 'image/vnd.microsoft.icon',
    mp3: 'audio/mpeg',
    mp4: 'video/mp4',
    mpeg: 'video/mpeg',
    webm: 'video/webm',
    wasm: 'application/wasm'
  }

  var normalized = value.toLowerCase()
  var slash = Math.max(normalized.lastIndexOf('/'), normalized.lastIndexOf('\\'))
  var name = normalized.slice(slash + 1)
  var dot = name.lastIndexOf('.')
  var suffix = dot === -1 ? name : name.slice(dot + 1)

  if (!suffix || (dot === 0 && slash !== -1 && name.indexOf('.', 1) === -1)) {
    return false
  }

  return types[suffix] || false
}

function candidate(path) {
  assertPath(path)

  if (path.length === 0) return '.'

  var isAbsolute = path.charCodeAt(0) === 47
  var trailingSeparator = path.charCodeAt(path.length - 1) === 47

  path = normalizeStringPosix(path, !isAbsolute)

  if (path.length === 0 && !isAbsolute) path = '.'
  if (path.length > 0 && trailingSeparator) path += '/'

  if (isAbsolute) return '/' + path
  return path
}

humanDisplayCode:
function candidate(opts) {
  if (!opts) {
    return defaults
  }

  if (opts.decoder !== null && opts.decoder !== undefined && typeof opts.decoder !== 'function') {
    throw new TypeError('Decoder has to be a function.')
  }

  if (
    typeof opts.charset !== 'undefined' &&
    opts.charset !== 'utf-8' &&
    opts.charset !== 'iso-8859-1'
  ) {
    throw new TypeError('The charset option must be either utf-8, iso-8859-1, or undefined')
  }
  var charset = typeof opts.charset === 'undefined' ? defaults.charset : opts.charset

  return {
    allowDots: typeof opts.allowDots === 'undefined' ? defaults.allowDots : !!opts.allowDots,
    allowPrototypes:
      typeof opts.allowPrototypes === 'boolean' ? opts.allowPrototypes : defaults.allowPrototypes,
    arrayLimit: typeof opts.arrayLimit === 'number' ? opts.arrayLimit : defaults.arrayLimit,
    charset: charset,
    charsetSentinel:
      typeof opts.charsetSentinel === 'boolean' ? opts.charsetSentinel : defaults.charsetSentinel,
    comma: typeof opts.comma === 'boolean' ? opts.comma : defaults.comma,
    decoder: typeof opts.decoder === 'function' ? opts.decoder : defaults.decoder,
    delimiter:
      typeof opts.delimiter === 'string' || utils.isRegExp(opts.delimiter)
        ? opts.delimiter
        : defaults.delimiter,

    depth: typeof opts.depth === 'number' || opts.depth === false ? +opts.depth : defaults.depth,
    ignoreQueryPrefix: opts.ignoreQueryPrefix === true,
    interpretNumericEntities:
      typeof opts.interpretNumericEntities === 'boolean'
        ? opts.interpretNumericEntities
        : defaults.interpretNumericEntities,
    parameterLimit:
      typeof opts.parameterLimit === 'number' ? opts.parameterLimit : defaults.parameterLimit,
    parseArrays: opts.parseArrays !== false,
    plainObjects:
      typeof opts.plainObjects === 'boolean' ? opts.plainObjects : defaults.plainObjects,
    strictNullHandling:
      typeof opts.strictNullHandling === 'boolean'
        ? opts.strictNullHandling
        : defaults.strictNullHandling
  }
}
aiDisplayCode:
const candidateDefaultOptions = {
  allowDots: false,
  allowPrototypes: false,
  arrayLimit: 20,
  charset: 'utf-8',
  charsetSentinel: false,
  comma: false,
  decoder: function (value) {
    return value
  },
  delimiter: '&',
  depth: 5,
  ignoreQueryPrefix: false,
  interpretNumericEntities: false,
  parameterLimit: 1000,
  parseArrays: true,
  plainObjects: false,
  strictNullHandling: false
}

function candidate(options) {
  if (options == null) {
    return candidateDefaultOptions
  }

  if (options.decoder != null && typeof options.decoder !== 'function') {
    throw new TypeError('Decoder has to be a function.')
  }

  if (
    options.charset !== undefined &&
    options.charset !== 'utf-8' &&
    options.charset !== 'iso-8859-1'
  ) {
    throw new TypeError('The charset option must be either utf-8, iso-8859-1, or undefined')
  }

  const isPattern = Object.prototype.toString.call(options.delimiter) === '[object RegExp]'

  return {
    allowDots:
      options.allowDots === undefined ? candidateDefaultOptions.allowDots : !!options.allowDots,
    allowPrototypes:
      typeof options.allowPrototypes === 'boolean'
        ? options.allowPrototypes
        : candidateDefaultOptions.allowPrototypes,
    arrayLimit:
      typeof options.arrayLimit === 'number'
        ? options.arrayLimit
        : candidateDefaultOptions.arrayLimit,
    charset: options.charset === undefined ? candidateDefaultOptions.charset : options.charset,
    charsetSentinel:
      typeof options.charsetSentinel === 'boolean'
        ? options.charsetSentinel
        : candidateDefaultOptions.charsetSentinel,
    comma: typeof options.comma === 'boolean' ? options.comma : candidateDefaultOptions.comma,
    decoder:
      typeof options.decoder === 'function' ? options.decoder : candidateDefaultOptions.decoder,
    delimiter:
      typeof options.delimiter === 'string' || isPattern
        ? options.delimiter
        : candidateDefaultOptions.delimiter,
    depth:
      typeof options.depth === 'number' || options.depth === false
        ? +options.depth
        : candidateDefaultOptions.depth,
    ignoreQueryPrefix: options.ignoreQueryPrefix === true,
    interpretNumericEntities:
      typeof options.interpretNumericEntities === 'boolean'
        ? options.interpretNumericEntities
        : candidateDefaultOptions.interpretNumericEntities,
    parameterLimit:
      typeof options.parameterLimit === 'number'
        ? options.parameterLimit
        : candidateDefaultOptions.parameterLimit,
    parseArrays: options.parseArrays !== false,
    plainObjects:
      typeof options.plainObjects === 'boolean'
        ? options.plainObjects
        : candidateDefaultOptions.plainObjects,
    strictNullHandling:
      typeof options.strictNullHandling === 'boolean'
        ? options.strictNullHandling
        : candidateDefaultOptions.strictNullHandling
  }
}

aiDisplayCode:
function candidate(left, right) {
  const numericKeys = ['generatedLine', 'generatedColumn', 'originalLine', 'originalColumn']
  const textOrder = (a, b) => {
    if (a === b) return 0
    if (a == null) return 1
    if (b == null) return -1
    return String(a) < String(b) ? -1 : 1
  }

  let difference = left[numericKeys[0]] - right[numericKeys[0]]
  if (difference) return difference

  difference = left[numericKeys[1]] - right[numericKeys[1]]
  if (difference) return difference

  difference = textOrder(left.source, right.source)
  if (difference) return difference

  difference = left[numericKeys[2]] - right[numericKeys[2]]
  if (difference) return difference

  difference = left[numericKeys[3]] - right[numericKeys[3]]
  if (difference) return difference

  return textOrder(left.name, right.name)
}
specSummary: Compares two mapping records to produce a deterministic ascending sort order by generated position, source identity, original position, and symbol identity.
